home.hero.title: Tesco Price Tracker
home.hero.sub: Live price history, analytics and alerts for every Tesco product.
home.feat.search.title: Search
home.feat.search.desc: Find any tracked Tesco product by name or TPNC. Current price shown instantly.
home.feat.catalogue.title: Catalogue
home.feat.catalogue.desc: Browse the full list of tracked items with prices, categories and ratings.
home.feat.analytics.title: Analytics
home.feat.analytics.desc: 11 charts, 12 KPI tiles, smart insights and platform-wide statistics.
home.feat.alerts.title: Alerts
home.feat.alerts.desc: Set target price or % drop triggers and never miss a deal.
home.step1.title: Search
home.step1.desc: Find a product by name or TPNC code.
home.step2.title: Explore
home.step2.desc: View full price history across all channels.
home.step3.title: Analyse
home.step3.desc: Open statistics for deep analytics and insights.
home.step4.title: Alert
home.step4.desc: Set a target price and buy at the right moment.
search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find products by name or TPNC identifier.
search.placeholder: Search by product name or TPNC…
search.empty.title: No results found

catalogue.empty.title: No products found

analytics.subtitle: Platform-wide statistics and price trends.

alerts.title: My Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Set price triggers from any product page.
alerts.email.label: Email notifications
alerts.email.desc: Receive digest emails when alerts are triggered
alerts.empty.title: No alerts yet
alerts.empty.sub: Open any product and set a price trigger to be notified when prices change.
alerts.signin.title: Sign in to view your alerts
alerts.signin.desc: Alerts are personal. Log in with your Tesco Tracker account to view and manage price alerts.
alerts.error.unavailable: Could not load alerts. Please try again later.
alerts.error.toggle: Could not update alert. Please try again.
